skills.name: Meeting Notes Formatter
skills.description: Transforms raw meeting transcripts or bullet-point notes into a structured summary with decisions, action items, and owners in a consistent team format.
skills.author: Pete Egan

skills.name: Jira Ticket Writer
skills.description: Converts a plain-English bug report or feature request into a fully structured Jira ticket with summary, acceptance criteria, and story point estimate reasoning.
skills.author: Pete Egan

skills.name: CSV Data Analyst
skills.description: Accepts pasted CSV data and returns statistical summaries, trend observations, anomaly flags, and suggested next steps — no BI tool or Python required.
skills.author: Pete Egan

skills.name: Policy Doc Summarizer
skills.description: Paste any policy document, HR policy, or vendor agreement and receive an executive summary, key obligations, important dates, and a plain-English explanation of what it means for you.
skills.author: Pete Egan

skills.name: PR Review Assistant
skills.description: Paste a Git diff or describe a code change to receive a structured code review covering correctness, edge cases, naming, and a recommended approval or change-request decision.
skills.author: Pete Egan

skills.name: VA Product Outline
skills.description: Creates complete, OKR-aligned product outlines for VA.gov / VES products. Reads your existing docs, asks four targeted questions, and produces a GitHub-ready markdown outline with KPI baselines, OKR mapping, and a MEMORY.md handoff file.
skills.author: Pete Egan
